rationale: The post-launch metrics show a decline in key performance indicators such as conversion rate, retention rates, and an increase in error rates and support tickets. These trends suggest that the product is not performing as expected and requires immediate attention. The significant increase in error rate is particularly concerning and should be addressed promptly. User sentiment is 0.075 with PR risk level: medium. 0 of 5 PM success criteria met. Finance estimates $10,762/day revenue at risk.
confidence_explanation: Low confidence (0.38) in Pause — situation is critical. Health score at 0.2. Immediate action recommended. Confidence in recovery would increase with a confirmed bug fix and stable rollback metrics.

risk_register.risk: Async payment processing under load may cause increased latency and errors, as noted in the release notes
risk_register.mitigation: Conduct additional load testing on the async payment processing system to identify and address potential bottlenecks.

risk_register.risk: Fraud-check middleware latency may compound with p95 spike, as observed in the Anomaly Re-check report
risk_register.mitigation: Optimize the fraud-check middleware to reduce latency and improve performance under load.

risk_register.risk: No legacy fallback for high-value orders may lead to increased error rates and support tickets, as noted in the release notes
risk_register.mitigation: Implement a legacy fallback for high-value orders to ensure a smooth payment process for users who may encounter issues with the new system.

risk_register.risk: Gateway timeout handling needs additional testing under load, as noted in the release notes
risk_register.mitigation: Conduct additional testing on the gateway timeout handling to ensure it can handle high volumes of traffic and prevent errors.

risk_register.risk: Dynamic fraud detection scoring for high-value orders may lead to false positives and negatively impact user experience, as observed in the Marketing Report
risk_register.mitigation: Fine-tune the dynamic fraud detection scoring system to reduce false positives and improve user experience.

action_plan.action: Halt rollout at current traffic — do not expand
Isolate payment service — roll back to stable version
Draft and schedule customer-facing status update
Set up 30-min war room sync for re-evaluation

communication_plan.internal: The recent product launch has received mixed feedback from users, with concerns around billing and performance issues. We need to prioritize addressing these technical issues to improve user experience and prevent further negative reviews.
communication_plan.external: Thank you for your feedback on our recent update. We apologize for any inconvenience caused by billing and performance issues. Our team is working hard to resolve these problems and improve your overall experience. We appreciate your patience and look forward to providing a better service soon.
